params.name: Laurel Crown
params.description: A crown woven from laurel leaves is a favorite fashion item among the Greeks. The famous god Apollo once made a laurel wreath himself to commemorate his lost love. Later generations often associate symbols such as eternity, immortality, honor, and achievement with the laurel crown.
